title: Suppress Previous Step Details When Navigating Between Steps
story: As a DataTools Pro user navigating through Metrics Analyst steps, I want the 'more info' detail panel to close when I switch to a different step, so that I don't see stale information from a previous step that confuses the current context.
description:
When a user clicks Step 2 or Step 3 in the Metrics Analyst, whatever 'more info' detail panel is currently displayed should be suppressed/closed. The bug occurs when a user has the Step 2 widgets 'more info' open and Step 3 completes — the user still sees the Step 2 detail content, which is confusing because Step 3 is now the active step.

To reproduce: Open 'more info' on Step 2 widgets, then click Step 3.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking a different step closes any open 'more info' detail panel
Step 3 completion does not display Step 2's detail content
Each step's 'more info' panel is independent and dismisses when switching
ux_changes: Step navigation now automatically closes any open 'more info' detail panel, preventing stale content from a previous step from being displayed.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the issue on staging.
